series_metadata.series_description: Documents related to the selection of subcontractors for Construction Manager at Risk and Design-Build construction management projects. Includes, but is not limited to, prequalification criteria and lists of prequalified companies along with Edge certifications, OSHA and Drug Free Workplace registration certifications,, bid tabs, notices of awards, correspondence, and other related documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: converted electronic format, or project financial close. ; Electronic: project financial close
